cv_data.name: Nowrin Tanhiad
cv_data.title: Healthcare Data Assistant
cv_data.profile: Detail-oriented Computer Science professional with a strong foundation in data analytics and database management. Proficient in SQL and Python for managing complex datasets and automating reporting workflows. Committed to ensuring high standards of data integrity and accuracy, specifically within healthcare environments, to support efficient patient record maintenance and organizational reporting.

bullets: Collaborated with multidisciplinary teams to coordinate organizational initiatives and large-scale projects.
Applied analytical problem-solving skills during technical hackathons to develop data-driven solutions.
Maintained organized documentation and contributed to team-based workflow optimization.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering
bullets: Core focus on Database Systems, Algorithms, and Data Management.
